core_payload.content:
# A2C Pipeline Project

## 1. Role
A2C Pipeline Project will become the industrial refinement program that raises capsule production toward higher trust, clearer branch routing, stronger evidence bundles, and more visible uncertainty handling across the full refinement line.

## 2. Future Project Contract
The project will widen throughput without lowering rigor. It will improve branch routing between Dream, Real, and quarantine outcomes; strengthen evidence packaging for review; expose where ambiguity entered the line; and tighten the handoff from refinery output into workspace, Symphony, and swarm execution lanes.

## 3. Operational Consequence
A2C will behave more like a true sovereign factory and less like a brittle transformation chain. The system will be able to refine difficult material at higher scale without sacrificing trust.

## 4. Philosophical Alignment
A2C Pipeline Project supports To Dig Deep by making refinement industrial, explicit, and auditable.

neuro_concentrate.summary: A2C Pipeline Project defines the future industrial refinement program of N1Hub: cleaner branch routing, stronger quarantine and evidence bundles, better observability of ambiguity, and safer packaging of refinery output for workspace, Symphony, and swarm lanes.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Stripped meta-commentary leakage. Dream now asserts future state directly.
